description: SYNTHETIC — on-sale announcement. NOT a purchase; must be rejected.

email.subject: JUST ANNOUNCED: Fred again.. at Madison Square Garden — on sale Friday
email.body:
Don't miss it!

Fred again.. is coming to Madison Square Garden on March 3, 2027.

Tickets on sale Friday at 10 AM local time. Presale starts Wednesday with code RORY.

Get ready: https://www.ticketmaster.com/fredagain

You're receiving this because you opted into artist alerts.
